title: MiSans-Medium GUI字体包 Font Pack
description:
告别原版字体 享受视觉美好。 Say goodbye to the original font and enjoy visual beauty.
一个由Misans-Medium字体改编而来的字体追加包。/A font add-on adapted from the Misans-Medium font.
body:
![描述图/Description Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/81defd70bb0e647107e7f729d52120e729bf1f07_0.webp)

告别原版字体 享受视觉美好。 Say goodbye to the original font and enjoy visual beauty.
一个由Misans-Medium字体改编而来的字体追加包。 A font add-on adapted from the Misans-Medium font.

本包符合"小米科技责任有限公司"对于本字体的分发要求。 This package complies with Xiaomi Technology Co., Ltd.'s distribution requirements for this font.

![许可协议/License Agreement](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e9194b8863edacfda39d5e2fe71a1866cbef6fa5.png)
[MiSans字体官网/MiSans Font Official Website](https://hyperos.mi.com/font/)
